title: kyllinga erecta var. africana
intro: Kyllinga erecta var. africana, also known as Red Tufted Kyllinga, is a type of grass-like sedge plant native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Kyllinga erecta var. africana include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and grinding the leaves or stems to make teas, infusions, or poultices for topical application.
